# Sasan Perfumes

> Sasan Perfumes is a UAE fragrance store selling perfumes, hair mist, all over spray, and gift sets. Start here for the main shopping, support, and policy pages.

## Start here

- [Home](https://sasanperfumes.com/en)
- [Shop all products](https://sasanperfumes.com/en/shop)
- [Contact us](https://sasanperfumes.com/en/contact)

## Product categories

- [Perfumes](https://sasanperfumes.com/en/category/perfumes)
- [All Over Spray](https://sasanperfumes.com/en/category/all-over-spray)
- [Hair Mist](https://sasanperfumes.com/en/category/sasan-hair-mist)
- [Gift Sets](https://sasanperfumes.com/en/category/gift-set)

## Services

- [Private labeling](https://sasanperfumes.com/en/private-labeling)
- [Services](https://sasanperfumes.com/en/services)

## Customer support

- WhatsApp: 0567394314
- Complaints & Calls: 0563982953

- [Returns](https://sasanperfumes.com/en/returns)
- [Privacy Policy](https://sasanperfumes.com/en/privacy)
